basic_details.job_title: DBEO Badaun Academic Resource Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Basic Education Officer Badaun (DBEO Badaun) Academic Resource Person (ARP) Notification 2026 has been released on 05 July 2026 on the official website badaun.nic.in. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced through the DBEO Badaun Academic Resource Person (ARP) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree with teacher training qualification, Minimum 5 years teaching experience in primary/upper primary schools
qualification.details: Graduate degree with teacher training qualification and minimum 5 years teaching experience in primary/upper primary schools under Basic Education Council UP.

salary_details.pay_scale: Mobility allowance Rs. 4500/- per month; salary drawn from original school
salary_details.details: Mobility allowance Rs. 4500/- per month; salary drawn from original school.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DBEO Badaun Academic Resource Person (ARP) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://budgam.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DBEO Badaun Academic Resource Person (ARP) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://budgam.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DBEO Badaun Academic Resource Person (ARP) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DBEO Badaun ARP recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Academic Resource Person (ARP) posts is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Resource Person (ARP) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies announced for the Academic Resource Person (ARP) position by the District Basic Education Officer Badaun.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DBEO Badaun Academic Resource Person (ARP) recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree along with a teacher training qualification and a minimum of 5 years of teaching experience in primary or upper primary schools.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the ARP post?
faq.answer: The ARP post includes a mobility allowance of Rs. 4500/- per month, and the candidate will continue to draw their salary from their original school.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Academic Resource Person (ARP) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally, a Merit List will be prepared based on performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Basic Education Officer Badaun, which is https://budgam.nic.in/.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are needed with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment and further information is https://budgam.nic.in/. Please visit this site for the most accurate and up-to-date details.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DBEO Badaun ARP recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Academic Resource Person (ARP) posts is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.
